channel.title: CyberNetSec - Security Operations
channel.description: Latest security operations threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: Palo Alto Networks to Acquire Portkey, an AI Gateway Startup, to Secure Autonomous AI Agents
item.description:
Palo Alto Networks has announced its planned acquisition of Portkey, a startup specializing in AI Gateway technology. The move is a strategic effort to address the emerging security challenges posed by the rise of autonomous AI agents in the enterprise. Portkey provides a centralized control plane t...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Security Operations, Cloud Security

Read Full Article →

item.title: CISA Warns of 'ShadowProxy' Phishing-as-a-Service that Bypasses MFA
item.description:
The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) and the FBI have issued a joint advisory about the growing threat from 'ShadowProxy,' a sophisticated Phishing-as-a-Service (PhaaS) platform. Sold on dark web forums, ShadowProxy enables even low-skilled criminals to launch large-scale phis...

Severity: High

Categories: Phishing, Threat Intelligence, Security Operations

Read Full Article →

item.title: NATO's Locked Shields 2026 Cyber Exercise Tests 4,000 Defenders Against 8,000 Live-Fire Attacks
item.description:
The world's largest and most complex live-fire cyber defense exercise, Locked Shields 2026, has concluded in Tallinn, Estonia. Organized by the NATO Cooperative Cyber Defence Centre of Excellence (CCDCOE), the exercise involved over 4,000 participants from 41 NATO and partner nations. The multinatio...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Security Operations, Policy and Compliance, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: Celerium Launches 'DIB CyberDome' to Automate CMMC Compliance for Defense SMBs
item.description:
Celerium has launched the DIB CyberDome, a cybersecurity platform tailored for the thousands of small and mid-sized businesses (SMBs) in the U.S. Defense Industrial Base (DIB). The platform is designed to help these contractors meet the complex requirements of the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certif...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Security Operations, Regulatory

Read Full Article →

item.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5.4-Cyber, a Specialized AI Model for Defensive Cybersecurity
item.description:
OpenAI has introduced GPT-5.4-Cyber, a specialized version of its latest large language model fine-tuned for defensive cybersecurity tasks. The model features fewer restrictions than its public counterpart, enabling security professionals to perform complex operations like binary reverse engineering...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Security Operations, Threat Intelligence, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: UK's NCSC Launches 'SilentGlass' Hardware to Block HDMI-Based Cyber Espionage
item.description:
The UK's National Cyber Security Centre (NCSC) has developed a new hardware device called 'SilentGlass' to protect against cyberattacks transmitted through video display cables. Unveiled at the CYBERUK conference, the plug-and-play device secures HDMI and DisplayPort connections by ensuring only the...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Security Operations, Threat Intelligence, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: CrowdStrike's 'Project QuiltWorks' Unites Industry to Tackle AI-Driven Vulnerability Surge
item.description:
CrowdStrike has launched 'Project QuiltWorks,' a new industry coalition designed to address the security risks arising from the accelerated discovery of software vulnerabilities by frontier AI models. Recognizing that models like those from OpenAI and Anthropic can find bugs at an unprecedented rate...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Threat Intelligence, Security Operations, Policy and Compliance

Read Full Article →

item.title: Major US Cement Producer Taps Aria Cybersecurity to Protect Critical Plant Operations
item.description:
Aria Cybersecurity, a business unit of CSPi, has announced an agreement to deploy its AZT PROTECT™ solution to secure the critical operational technology (OT) environments of a major, unnamed US cement producer. The cement industry is considered a high-value target for cyberattacks, including state-...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Industrial Control Systems, Cyberattack, Security Operations

Read Full Article →

item.title: ENISA Updates Framework for National Cybersecurity Assessment
item.description:
The European Union Agency for Cybersecurity (ENISA) has released version 2.0 of its National Capabilities Assessment Framework (NCAF). The updated framework and online tool provide a methodology for EU member states to assess the maturity of their National Cybersecurity Strategies (NCSS). Aligned wi...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Regulatory, Security Operations

Read Full Article →

item.title: Semperis Extends Purple Knight AD Security Tool to US Government Clouds
item.description:
Semperis has announced that its free identity security assessment tool, Purple Knight, now fully supports Microsoft's Government Community Cloud High (GCC High) environments. This update allows U.S. federal agencies and defense contractors to scan their Entra ID tenants within the specialized, high-...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Security Operations, Policy and Compliance, Cloud Security

Read Full Article →
